summary: Made one surgical continuity edit to support the handoff into chapter 9 by establishing the chair as Eszter's before the next chapter refers to Beni lifting his jacket from it. The opening already used a distinct structure from the visible adjacent opening, so no opening rewrite was needed.
edits: Added a brief end-of-scene beat with Eszter moving into the chair and Beni's jacket shifted onto it, aligning with chapter 9's 'Eszter's chair' reference.
Checked the style bible for calibration-only example_lines and found none to replace.
